description:
The SimplexTurbulentForce component is used to make random noise throughout an entire particle system that affects particles moving through it by changing their movement.

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.Mode: How to affect Particles in terms of force.
fields.Strength: How strong is the force effect.
fields.GlobalNoiseOffset: The 4th dimensional offset of the noise. Essentially a seed.
fields.Scale: How much to scale up or down the noise from it's center.
fields.Offset: How much to shift the noise on its axies.
fields.X_NoiseOffset: How much to offset the noise on the X axis.
fields.Y_NoiseOffset: How much to offset the noise on the Y axis.
fields.Z_NoiseOffset: How much to offset the noise on the Z axis.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
